text: Welcome to The People's Branch
An interactive civic platform for every American
The map shows every state — click to explore
To get started, click Login
Click New User to create your account
This is the sign-up page
Enter your email address
Add your name — optional but helps us serve you better
Select your age range
Click Continue with Email
Check your inbox for a verification link
One click and you're verified — one email, one citizen
After verifying, visit your Profile to set your location
This is your Profile — your civic identity
Set your state and town to connect to your community
Click to choose your state and type your town name
Your congressional district is detected automatically
Now let's find your representatives
My Reps — everyone who represents you
From Congress all the way to your town hall
See their contact info, voting record, and more
That's it — you're set up and ready to participate
